title: Yijing Hexagram 50: Ding (The Cauldron)
description: Hexagram 50 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 50 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: The Cauldron. Supreme good fortune. Success. Fire over wood: the image of the Cauldron.
